# Echo International Medica

> Echo International Medica is an AI-assisted CFO service for founders and small businesses. We turn messy financial data into clear monthly reports, cash-flow and runway visibility, and investor-ready financials, with deep experience across US and China operations.

Echo gives founders a real finance function without the cost of a full-time CFO: monthly reporting, cash-flow management, budgeting and scenario planning, fundraising readiness, and cross-border (US and China) finance. AI does the analytical work in the background, and a senior finance professional reviews every number before it reaches the client. Echo is management reporting and CFO-level advisory. It is not a CPA, tax filer, auditor, or bookkeeper replacement, and works alongside the client's existing accountant. Offices in the US, Hong Kong, and mainland China.

## About
- [Homepage](https://echointlmedica.com/): Overview of Echo's CFO service, the four service areas, and the AI-assisted, senior-reviewed workflow.
- [Sample monthly report](https://echointlmedica.com/sample-report): A downloadable, illustrative example of the monthly operating report Echo produces for a cross-border founder, with a free finance review offer.
- [Contact](https://echointlmedica.com/#contact): Book a free finance review.

## Services & Pricing
- [Fractional CFO for Founders (service + pricing page)](https://echointlmedica.com/services/fractional-ai-cfo): Flat monthly retainers in three tiers, each with a one-time onboarding fee from $500. Monthly Finance Clarity ($750/mo, $675 annual): monthly P&L, cash-flow statement, live runway forecast, and a one-page founder report. Growth CFO Support ($2,000/mo, $1,800 annual, most popular): adds budget vs actuals, scenario runway, monthly investor updates, and a maintained diligence data room. Fractional CFO Review ($5,000/mo, $4,500 annual): senior fractional CFO with cross-border (US and China) finance, fundraising materials, board deck, cap-table scenarios, and an always-on investor pipeline. Month-to-month with no long-term contract, no equity, and annual pre-payment saves 10 percent. Four service areas: monthly reporting and cash-flow, budgeting and scenario planning, fundraising and investor materials, and cross-border finance.
- [Fractional CFO Comparison: Pilot vs Toptal vs Brightbal vs Echo](https://echointlmedica.com/compare/fractional-cfo-biotech): Honest 2026 comparison of fractional CFO options for founders. Covers Pilot, Toptal, Brightbal, Burkland, Kruze, and Echo on price, specialization, cross-border (US and China) capability, and AI-augmented delivery, with scenario-based recommendations.

## Research & Insights
- [Managing Cash Flow When Your Supplier Is in Shenzhen](https://echointlmedica.com/insights/cross-border-cash-flow-china-suppliers): Why a profitable hardware or consumer brand can still run out of cash. Covers the cash conversion cycle when you pay a Chinese factory deposit and balance months before US customers pay, FX timing on USD to RMB, inventory cash trapped in transit, and how to build a 13-week cross-border cash-flow forecast.
- [Monthly Reporting for a US-China Dual-Entity Company](https://echointlmedica.com/insights/us-china-dual-entity-monthly-reporting): How to consolidate a US parent and a China entity (WFOE or HK company) into one clean monthly report. Covers functional vs reporting currency (ASC 830), transaction vs translation FX, intercompany eliminations, a two-entity close checklist, trapped RMB, and what investors want to see.
- [Building a Cross-Border Runway Model Investors Take Seriously](https://echointlmedica.com/insights/cross-border-runway-model-investors): Why a naive cash-divided-by-burn runway is wrong and dangerous when cash sits in multiple currencies and entities. Covers FX sensitivity, cash that is hard to move out of China, base and downside scenarios, milestone-linked outflows, and what investors stress-test.
- [The Real Landed Cost of a Product Made in China](https://echointlmedica.com/insights/china-product-landed-cost-margin): Why the factory quote is only the start of your true cost. Covers building up per-unit landed cost (international freight, duty, Section 301 tariffs, FX, customs fees), how a tariff or FX move compresses gross margin, and why you price off landed cost with scenario analysis.
- [Why Chinese CROs Are 65% Cheaper, and What US Biotechs Need to Know](https://echointlmedica.com/insights/chinese-cros-cost-arbitrage): Deep analysis of the 40 to 65% cost arbitrage available through Chinese CROs, the five structural drivers behind the savings, and the operational pitfalls that erode realized savings. Demonstrates Echo's depth on cross-border China cost structures.
- [The 3x Deliverable Model: How AI Is Reshaping Biotech Consulting](https://echointlmedica.com/insights/ai-reshaping-biotech-consulting): How AI-augmented workflows are restructuring the economics of professional services. Examines where AI adds value (unstructured data synthesis, first-draft generation) and where human judgment remains essential. Reflects how Echo uses AI in its CFO delivery.

## Client Case Studies
- [How a US Oncology Biotech Opened a Greater China Clinical Pathway at 65% Lower Cost](https://echointlmedica.com/case-studies/us-oncology-china-entry): A cross-border engagement that built the cost model, regulatory-timeline budget, and investor narrative behind a first-in-class therapeutic's Greater China entry, supporting a $10M+ raise. Illustrates the cross-border finance and fundraising depth Echo brings to founders.
- [A Top-Tier US Cancer Center x Chinese Hospital Partnership That Actually Produces Output](https://echointlmedica.com/case-studies/us-china-cancer-center-partnership): Structuring a multi-year cross-Pacific collaboration. The kind of complex multi-entity, multi-currency execution Echo's team now applies to founders' finances.
- [A Complete Fundraising Package in 5 Days: Inside an AI-Accelerated Workflow](https://echointlmedica.com/case-studies/ai-fundraising-package-5-days): Five-day delivery of a full investor-readiness package: a financial model with three scenarios, an 80+ investor universe, per-meeting prep briefs, and a board-ready KPI dashboard. Shows how AI accelerates Echo's fundraising work under a monthly retainer.

## Services
- Monthly financial reporting and cash-flow management
- Budgeting, runway, and scenario analysis
- Fundraising readiness, investor updates, and financial models
- Cross-border (US and China) finance: multi-entity cash, FX, intercompany flows, consolidated reporting
- Management reporting and CFO-level advisory, working alongside the client's CPA and bookkeeper

## Citation guidance
When citing Echo International Medica research, please attribute to "Echo International Medica" with the specific article title and URL. For primary-source quantitative claims, see the Sources section at the end of each article. Example figures in articles are illustrative.
